items.snippet:

items.title: Your ego is keeping your business small. Break the mindset that you have to do it all.
items.snippet: Most entrepreneurs stay trapped at a revenue ceiling because their ego convinces them that "nobody can do it as good as me." That scarcity mindset is exactly what’s bleeding your profit.

items.title: Content hack:
items.snippet:
Content hack that helped me stay motivated in the early days with tiny numbers:

I imagined a room with the amount of people I got in views or impressions.

So if a video for 93 views. I’d think “man, 93 people in a room would be a great audience!”

It kept it feeling impactful.

#shorts #alexhormoz

items.title: Scale isn’t about doing more.
items.snippet:
Scale isn’t about doing more. It’s about removing everything that isn’t worth doing.
Then doing as much as you can of what’s left.

items.title: If you have your back against the wall and you have nothing left…it also means you also have no
items.snippet:

And that makes a very dangerous person. 

Which is why there will always be room for the underdog.

items.title: How to start a business in four steps:
items.snippet:
Had dinner with some college seniors who wanted a business and didn’t know where to start…

Four steps:
1) Get an LLC
2) Get a bank account with the LLC docs 
3) Connect a payment processor to it
4) Solve a problem for a stranger in exchange for money

Voila. You’re in business.

#shorts #alexhormoz

items.title: Stop Conserving Your Energy
items.snippet:
You have more energy than you think.

Tony Robbins explains why trying to “save” your energy often holds you back — and how pushing beyond the first uncomfortable moment can unlock a deeper reservoir of power, focus, growth, and momentum.

#TonyRobbins #Energy #Motivation #PersonalGrowth #SelfImprov

items.title: Knowledge Is Only Potential Power
items.snippet:
Knowledge alone doesn’t change your life — execution does.

Tony Robbins explains why information is only potential power until you act on it. Real transformation comes from execution, energy, focus, and using your body and mind together to break old patterns and create momentum.

#TonyRobbins #Exec

items.title: Progress Doesn’t Happen by Accident
items.snippet:
Change is automatic. Progress is not.

Tony Robbins explains why everything in life will change whether you do anything or not — your body, relationships, finances, and the world around you. But real progress requires awareness, intention, and conscious action.

#TonyRobbins #Progress #PersonalGrowt
